headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -108.6)
key_insights: Fears trending up 166% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 99.7 points from 133 quotes, with 103 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today.

• This sits in the upper half of the 115-day range but well below the peak of 159, indicating high but not extreme frustration levels.

• Fears jumped significantly from yesterday's -6.5 to 4.9, while Optimism recovered from its recent low but remains negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
